title: SPARC - Setting up the BEADS for the Millipore Metabolic Rat Milliplex Assay
author: Doris Kemler

steps.title: Before making the beads, the filter...
steps.instruction: Before making the beads, the filter plate must be pre-wet for at least 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add 75 µL, assay buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 75 µL, assay buffer to each well using the teal (15-1250µl) Eclip tip using only 6 pipette tips (see below for diagram), using settings Preset>stepper>pre-step, 75ul, 12x, 3, 4 (will pull up 900µl). Use only 6 tips (pipette twice in the same row first in tube 1 and then in tube 2) to pipette like so: Row ### # # # # # # # # # 111111 222222 The spacing should be set to narrowest and you will be adding to every other row. Do some mini drops on the plate to get the liquids to the bottom of the wells.

steps.title: Replace plate lid and place plate...
steps.instruction: Replace plate lid and place plate on the blue shaker, making sure to tape it securely, before shaking the plate for at least 00:10:00 (longer is okay).

steps.title: Take each bead vial out and verify the bead identity
steps.instruction: Take each bead vial out and verify the bead identity. Pay attention to active vs total forms of analytes.

steps.title: Unscrew the lid a little and...
steps.instruction: Unscrew the lid a little and screw it back on (but not super tight).

steps.title: Place each vial into the multi tube vortex holder
steps.instruction: Place each vial into the multi tube vortex holder.

steps.title: Place the vortexer in the large...
steps.instruction: Place the vortexer in the large bucket (to prevent splashing of water on outside of vials). (if you don't have it in large bucket, water can be sprayed all over the lab bench!)

steps.title: Label a blue screw-top 5mL tube...
steps.instruction: Label a blue screw-top 5mL tube with mixed beads and date, and wrap it in aluminum foil to protect it from light .

steps.title: Gather tray labeled with " bead...
steps.instruction: Gather tray labeled with " bead diluents 384 well half plate " and " mixed beads tray " and make sure they are clean and dust-free.

steps.title: Fill "bead diluents 384 well half...
steps.instruction: Fill "bead diluents 384 well half plate" with the whole vial of bead diluents.

steps.title: Using clip-tip 15-1250µL teal electronic pipettor,...
steps.instruction: Using clip-tip 15-1250µL teal electronic pipettor, select "program forward" with the options: Set volume = 100 Speed up = 5 Speed out = 2

steps.title: Set up tip box to have...
steps.instruction: Set up tip box to have 4 rows of 5 tips across. * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

steps.title: Check Branson Sonicator
steps.instruction: Check Branson Sonicator. The water must be at the water line level. If it is not, raise using distilled H 2 O.

steps.title: Place all 10 tubes in the...
steps.instruction: Place all 10 tubes in the multi-tube vortex holder and put the lid on.

steps.title: Sonicate samples for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Sonicate samples for 00:00:30 . Do not get the caps wet!

steps.title: Vortex the tubes for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Vortex the tubes for 00:01:00 . Work quickly when working with beads.

steps.title: Take the bead vials out and...
steps.instruction: Take the bead vials out and put them in the Eppendorf rack, with 5 tubes on one side and 5 tubes on the other side.

steps.title: Open all of the lids (leave...
steps.instruction: Open all of the lids (leave them next to the vials)

steps.title: Set the pipette to the widest setting (12
steps.instruction: Set the pipette to the widest setting (12.9).

steps.title: Take up 100µl from the first...
steps.instruction: Take up 100µl from the first 5 bead vial tubes (each tube contains 200µl beads).

steps.title: Dispense into the mixed bead tray
steps.instruction: Dispense into the mixed bead tray. DO NOT eject tips.

steps.title: Take the remaining 100µl from the...
steps.instruction: Take the remaining 100µl from the original 5 bead vial tubes and dispense into the mixed bead tray.

steps.title: Use new tips to take up...
steps.instruction: Use new tips to take up 100µl bead diluents and rinse the tube with the 100µl bead diluents before dispensing into the mixed bead tray.

steps.title: Rinse the tubes for the second...
steps.instruction: Rinse the tubes for the second time with 100µl bead diluents and dispense into the mixed bead tray.

steps.title: Repeat with the second 5 tubes:
steps.instruction: Repeat with the second 5 tubes:

steps.title: Take up 100µl from the second...
steps.instruction: Take up 100µl from the second 5 tubes (each tube contains 200µl beads).

steps.title: Dispense into the mixed bead tray
steps.instruction: Dispense into the mixed bead tray. DO NOT eject tips.

steps.title: Take the remaining 100µl from the...
steps.instruction: Take the remaining 100µl from the original 5 bead vial tubes and dispense into the mixed bead tray.

steps.title: Use new tips to take up...
steps.instruction: Use new tips to take up 100µl bead diluents and rinse the tube with the 100µl bead diluents before dispensing into the mixed bead tray.

steps.title: Rinse the tubes for the second...
steps.instruction: Rinse the tubes for the second time with 100µl bead diluents and dispense into the mixed bead tray.

steps.title: Use a 1mL pipette to mix...
steps.instruction: Use a 1mL pipette to mix the beads very well and transfer to the 5mL tube with aluminum foil around.
